videos.title: The Emergency Measures which Must Be Taken Now!
videos.description: Helga Zepp-LaRouche's keynote address to the first panel of the June 26-27 Schiller Institute conference. The opening session, “War with Russia and China Is Worse than MAD,” which included representatives from Russia, China, India and the United States, intensified the Schiller Institute’s 18-month drive for a summit of leaders of those four, genuinely to substitute collaboration in development in place of war.

videos.title: Panel 1: Whom the Gods Would Destroy: War With Russia and China Is Worse Than MAD!

videos.title: Time to End the "Rules" Based Order — Restore the Common Good

chapters.title: Col. (ret.) Richard H. Black Former State Senator (VA), former head of US Amy Criminal Law Division

videos.description:
We present this video to introduce you to the Schiller Institute’s ongoing series of conferences designed to make sure you understand and know how to defeat what is called the “rules based international order” perpetrated by those would be masters of the planet who have deliberately robbed us of tens of millions of lives through disease, famine, war, and other products of the under-development they insist on.

Watch the June 26-27 Schiller Institute conference in its entirety:
https://bit.ly/34NTlkb
